choices.text: Navisworks (or similar) runs automated checks: HVAC duct hitting beam, plumbing through column, doors clashing walls. Catch in model BEFORE built → save $$$ in rework. Major BIM value driver for owner.

4D = BIM + schedule (activities linked to model elements, visualize construction sequence over time, Synchro/Navisworks). 5D = + cost (auto-quantities, real-time cost tracking, value engineering). 6D adds sustainability; 7D adds operations.
